reasoning: The question is essentially asking whether GTA VI will release in 2025, as Rockstar traditionally uses synchronized global releases for major titles, meaning a European release will coincide with the US release. Take-Two Interactive explicitly reiterated the Fall 2025 release window in their recent February 2025 earnings call. Although Rockstar has a well-known history of delaying significant titles (e.g., GTA V, Red Dead Redemption 2), there is a strong financial incentive to launch in time for the 2025 holiday season to capitalize on massive projected revenue. Furthermore, modern game development schedules and Take-Two's firm reaffirmation suggest a relatively structured timeline. I estimate a 77% chance that the game hits its stated Fall 2025 target (possibly late November) without being pushed into 2026.
